Practice Management

owl practice vs simplepractice canada

Last updated: January 15, 2025 • 6 min read

# owl practice vs simplepractice canada You’ve opened your practice, hung your shingle, and now you’re staring at two checkout pages: Owl Practice and SimplePractice. Both promise to run your calendar, billing, and notes, but one quotes you in CAD and stores data in Montreal while the other bills USD and keeps servers in Virginia. That difference alone can eat into your revenue and keep you up at night wondering if your college will flag you at audit. In this post I’ll walk you through the exact comparison I wish I’d had when I chose my own EHR—pricing in real dollars, OHIP vs. manual billing, telehealth compliance with CASL/PIPEDA, and whether “unlimited clients” actually matters when you’re capped at 30 sessions a week. **Quick verdict:** Owl Practice wins for Canadian therapists who need provincial billing and Canadian data residency without extra legwork. SimplePractice is the smoother, prettier tool if you’re cash-only or comfortable storing data in the US and handling taxes manually. --- ## Pricing compared for Canadian therapists ### Owl Practice pricing - Solo: $45 CAD/mo (unlimited clients, Canadian support, telehealth included) - Group: $75 CAD/mo for 3 users; each extra clinician +$25 - Yearly discount: 10 % when paid up front ### SimplePractice pricing (USD, add ~35 % FX) - Basic: $39 USD/mo (+$10 if you want telehealth) - Pro: $59 USD/mo (includes Wiley notes & telehealth) - Each extra clinician: +$15 USD/mo - Yearly discount: 15 % **Bottom line:** After exchange, SimplePractice Basic with telehealth lands around $78 CAD—$33 more than Owl—and you still don’t get provincial billing codes. --- ## Canadian billing & provincial health plans ### Owl Practice - Pre-loaded fee codes for OHIP, MSP, AHCIP, MCP, NIHB - HST/GST auto-added to invoices - Direct electronic submission to Telus Health, ClaimSecure, NIHB - OHIP e-claim beta launching Q4 2024 ### SimplePractice - Lets you create custom fee schedules, but you type in every provincial code manually - Exports CMS-1500 PDFs; no e-remittance to provincial portals - You reconcile payments outside the system If even 20 % of your revenue is from provincial plans, the hours you’ll spend reconciling explanations of benefits make Owl cheaper in practice. --- ## Telehealth: CASL & PIPEDA compliance Owl’s video servers sit in AWS ca-central-1; no data crosses the border. Client reminders use Canadian SMS gateways, so you’re automatically CASL-compliant. SimplePractice video routes through US servers. Most colleges allow it, but you’ll need to add a consent clause that data leaves Canada and keep a copy on file. --- ## Data residency: where is Canadian client data stored? | Feature | Owl Practice | SimplePractice | |---------|--------------|---------------| | Server location | Montreal (ca-central-1) | N. Virginia (us-east-1) | | Backups | Same region | US | | College flag risk | Low | Medium—check your standards | Many Canadian colleges “recommend” Canadian data residency; some require it. If you’re audited, Owl gives you one less headache. --- ## Ease of use & onboarding Owl’s setup wizard asks for “province,” “postal code,” and loads Canadian holidays. French-language intake forms are two clicks away. SimplePractice has the slicker UI and faster mobile app, but the default dropdown still shows “State” and “Zip” unless you manually toggle country—every form, every time. --- ## Integrations & add-ons Owl keeps it Canadian: Telus e-claims, Stripe Canada, Fullscript CA, Mailchimp, Google/Outlook calendars. SimplePractice offers 30+ integrations—Wiley planners, Headway, BetterHelp—but most are US-centric. If you cross-refer to US providers or want the Wiley notes, that’s a win for SimplePractice. --- ## Customer support hours in Canadian time zones - **Owl:** Live chat & phone Mon-Fri 8 am-8 pm EST; French reps available - **SimplePractice:** Email & chat 6 am-5 pm PST (9 am-8 pm EST); no French support If you’re in Atlantic time, Owl’s 8 pm EST line still answers; SimplePractice’s chat is offline. --- ## User reviews from Canadian therapists - **Owl:** 4.7/5 on the CCPA directory (n=312). Users love the OHIP batch upload; main gripe is dated interface. - **SimplePractice:** 4.5/5 on Capterra CA (n=1,100). Praised for UX; complaints about USD pricing and no Canadian billing. --- ## Pros & cons table | Aspect | Owl Practice Pros | Owl Practice Cons | SimplePractice Pros | SimplePractice Cons | |--------|-----------------|-------------------|---------------------|---------------------| | Data | Canadian servers | UI looks 2015 | Modern UX | US servers | | Billing | Provincial codes built-in | Fewer integrations | Tons of US add-ons | Manual tax setup | | Price | CAD, no FX | Mobile app basic | Polished mobile | USD + 35 % | | Language | Bilingual forms | Canada-only clients | Frequent updates | No French support | | Taxes | T4A auto | — | — | HST/GST manual | --- ## Who should choose which **Choose Owl Practice if you:** - Bill provincial health plans or NIHB - Need CRA-compliant receipts/T4A slips - Prefer Canadian data residency out of the box - Want CAD pricing certainty **Choose SimplePractice if you:** - Run a cash-only or US-cross-border practice - Value slick mobile apps and Wiley note templates - Don’t mind storing data in the US and handling HST manually - Need integrations like Headway or BetterHelp --- ## FAQ ### Is Owl Practice PIPEDA compliant for Canadian therapists? Yes—servers and backups stay in AWS ca-central-1 (Montreal), so you meet PIPEDA and most provincial privacy acts without extra paperwork. ### Can SimplePractice submit OHIP e-claims? Not at present. You can print CMS-1500 forms or manually enter claims in the MOH portal; reconciliation is done outside SimplePractice. ### Does Owl Practice generate T4A slips for CRA? It auto-exports a T4A data file at year-end; you upload it to CRA’s online portal—no spreadsheet gymnastics. ### Which platform is cheaper after USD exchange? At 1.35 FX, SimplePractice Basic with telehealth costs roughly $78 CAD vs. Owl’s $45 CAD solo plan. ### Do either integrate with Quebec’s RAMQ? Neither platform offers direct RAMQ submission yet; Owl plans to add it in 2025. --- ## Conclusion If you’re billing provincial plans or simply want Canadian data residency and tax compliance without manual hacks, Owl Practice is the safer, cheaper pick. If you’re cash-only and live inside your phone, SimplePractice’s polished UX and deep US integrations are tempting—just budget for FX fees and an extra consent form. Ready to test the workflow yourself? Start a 30-day free trial of the winner here: Try OWL_PRACTICE free → or compare side-by-side with SimplePractice here: Try SIMPLEPRACTICE free →.
